description_long: This is an ornate wooden vanity desk with a matching cushioned stool. The desk features a rich, dark wood finish, elegantly curved legs, and a scalloped front edge. It has two small drawers on either side of a central raised section, which supports an oval mirror with decorative wooden framing. A small vase with pink tulips sits atop the left side of the desk, adding a touch of softness. The stool has a hexagonal-patterned white cushion and matching wooden legs. The overall design is classic and refined, suitable for personal grooming or decorative purposes.
description: A classic wooden vanity desk with an oval mirror, two small drawers, and a cushioned stool, featuring elegant curves and a decorative vase with flowers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval mirror, two small drawers, scalloped desk edge, and the cushioned stool positioned in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the thickness of the mirror, and the vase with flowers on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mirror and desk, with no drawers or decorative features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right profile of the desk, the vase, and the stool's cushion pattern.
attribute_orientation: The side with the mirror, drawers, and scalloped edge is intended to face the user, with the stool positioned in front for seating.
